{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323044203E9E2DB6638298469F80D"}"},"total":1772},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7579800779451138840","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"说实话，对黑光的改写太棒了！！！作为S级最强肉体，原著破防之后就立马怂了真的太弱鸡了，最强“守护之心”黑光真的太棒了！希望尽快更新，不够看呀[我也强推][求爆更][雀食神作]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764814372,"group_id":"7533813998630734872","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4ZB+m65imnhACuPukN4tdNvzD8Yw31QOVDeOaYB9BBU","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3056285704790680","user_name":"平平常常的金甲神"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3056285704790680","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7533813998630734872","book_info":{"abstract":"一觉醒来，林默穿越成了King，开局就贴脸疫苗人，就在即将下线时，一个锃亮的光头突兀闪现。
“普通拳”
林默获救了，也激活了他脑海里的情绪值系统。
【检测到琦玉的惆怅（极度微弱）：+1点。】
【检测到疫苗人的惊愕（残留）：+5000点】
林默从此开始了小心翼翼的生活
直到怪人协会来袭，面对四位龙级怪人，KING已然无愧“地表最强”之名：“你们对力量一无所知。”
